chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1657 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.8512/2023 2. For hearing of main case 03.02.2025 Mr. Bilawal Hussain Soomro, advocate for the petitioners Mr. Imran Ahmed Khan Abro, Assistant Advocate General Through this petition the petitioners seek appointment as Police Constables. The competitive recruitment process is stated to have been initiated in the year 2022 in which the petitioners had also applied. The comments demonstrate that 487 positions of Police Constable were advertised in the relevant districts in which commensurate numbers were appointed as per merit. The comments further state that the petitioners could not be appointed on account of being low in the merit position. No rejoinder etc. to the aforesaid is on the file. Even otherwise this court cannot go into the disputed question of facts requiring inquiry and investigation. Even the successful candidates, who would be displaced in the event that this petition was entertained, have not been impleaded herein. In view hereof this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
